name.description: Name of an active assumed-name (DBA) registration for an entity, used as a stable identifier when the assumed-name registration is being modified (vs. terminated). Distinct from filing.terminated_fictitious_name (MLPA-5A), which is a one-shot 'name-being-killed' value, and from entity.maine_assumed_name_for_suffix (foreign-qualification suffix-correction), which is a Maine-side alias for a foreign entity's home name. assumed_name.* is the namespace for ongoing-DBA modification filings.

current_location.description: Free-text description of the location(s) currently associated with an active assumed-name registration — the as-is state that a modification filing will change.

change_locations.description: Boolean elect-in: this filing intends to modify the location(s) where the assumed name is used. May be combined with add_locations/delete_locations on the same filing (form text reads 'The limited partnership intends to:' followed by 3 independent checkboxes).

add_locations.description: Boolean elect-in: this filing intends to add additional location(s) to the assumed-name registration.

delete_locations.description: Boolean elect-in: this filing intends to delete location(s) from the assumed-name registration.

lineN.description: Multi-line free-text description of the change/addition/deletion. 2 inline lines on MLPA-5B (line1, line2). Same multi-line shape primitive as amendment.changes_description.lineN (MLPA-13A) — synth concatenates non-empty lines. If more space is needed the form provides an exhibit-letter blank (see assumed_name_change.additional_locations_exhibit_letter).

additional_locations_attached.description: Boolean opt-in indicating that additional location entries (beyond what fits inline) are appended on a separate exhibit.

additional_locations_exhibit_letter.description: Single-letter inline exhibit reference for the additional-locations exhibit when assumed_name_change.additional_locations_attached is true.

entities.description: Entity name(s) the filing covers, as listed on the cover block.
